subject: Exposing the node port for sparky-be
commit_message:
Exposing the node port for sparky-be

Removed the cluster ip and set the node port to 20. Also disabiling ssl
as portal does not support ssl yet.

Issue-ID: OOM-347
Change-Id: Ia0431bb4b72e709df7e867ccae01b0b8219088d9
Signed-off-by: Arul.Nambi <arul.nambi@amdocs.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 2: Code-Review+1

visual review ok - did not pull patch and test yet

Patch Set 2:

If you have some test results (curl, screencap) - paste anything - thank you

Patch Set 2:

302xx port screencap looks good

Patch Set 3:

Mandeep, if this patch from Arul looks good, can you please merge, so that I can submit another patch separately to handle the xDemo port 30234 that you suggested in email. I will touch the same files, so I will wait for this merge and I want to keep the commits separate.

Patch Set 3:

> Mandeep, if this patch from Arul looks good, can you please merge,
 > so that I can submit another patch separately to handle the xDemo
 > port 30234 that you suggested in email. I will touch the same
 > files, so I will wait for this merge and I want to keep the commits

I meant to submit another commit separately not a patch.

Patch Set 3:

I do not see externalPort used anywhere in this chart. Therefore its value should not matter. Actually, it can be removed at all.
oom/kubernetes/aai/charts/aai-sparky-be# grep -r externalPort
values.yaml:  externalPort: 30220
Patch Set 4: Published edit on patch set 3.

Patch Set 4: Code-Review+2 Verified+1
